checks.description: Detect the configured Java release, sourceCompatibility, or toolchain target.
Find JDK internal API usage that can break across Java runtime upgrades.
Find Serializable classes without explicit serialVersionUID declarations.
Find reflection usage that may need module or runtime compatibility validation.
Capture Maven or Gradle compile and test validation on the Java 21 target.
Summarize compile, test, rollback, binary compatibility, public API compatibility, and confidence evidence.
Apply client-defined .preflight-rules.yml checks to readiness scoring and report evidence.
